Family Practice Services

We offer complete medical care for patients in College Station, and Bryan, TX from birth through geriatrics. We can take care of your entire family's needs, from infant well child visits and shots, screening physicals, acute care (colds, flu, sprains, back pain, allergies, headaches etc.).

Our family practice offers minor procedures including wart and mole removal, and sutures etc. We also take care of pap smears and most routine gynecological issues. I love the medical care of Family Medicine because it allows me to manage a wide variety of medical diagnoses, truly taking care of the whole patient, as well as the whole family in College Station and Bryan.

Contact us

To schedule an appointment, call 979-695-3570.

BCS Abundant Life Family Practice PA
2911 Texas Ave. South, Suite 202
College Station, TX 77845

Hours

  • Monday — Thursday 8:00am to 5:00pm
  • Friday 8:00am to 2:00pm
  • Lunch hours M to Th, 12-1. On Fridays, there is no lunch break.
